columns.name: RequestSize
columns.description: The size of the request payload.

columns.name: ExecTime
columns.description: The execution time of the request.

columns.name: StatusCode
columns.description: The status code of the response.

columns.name: ResponseSize
columns.description: The size of the response payload.

columns.name: Success
columns.description: Indicates if the request was successful.

columns.name: UserInitiatedLogout
columns.description: Indicates if the logout was user-initiated.

columns.name: IsSuccess
columns.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

columns.name: IsSecure
columns.description: Indicates if the connection is secure.

columns.name: IsScheduled
columns.description: Indicates if the job is scheduled.

columns.name: IsNew
columns.description: Indicates if the job is new.

columns.name: IsMobile
columns.description: Indicates if the job is mobile.

columns.name: IsLongRunningRequest
columns.description: Indicates if the job is a long-running request.

columns.name: IsGuest
columns.description: Indicates if the user is a guest.

columns.name: IsFirstRequest
columns.description: Indicates if this is the first request.

columns.name: IsError
columns.description: Indicates if there was an error.

columns.name: IsApi
columns.description: Indicates if the request is an API request.

columns.name: IsAjaxRequest
columns.description: Indicates if the request is an AJAX request.

columns.name: FirstInterimResponseStart
columns.description: The first interim response start time.

columns.name: AllOrNone
columns.description: Indicates if the operation is all or none.

columns.name: CountsAgainstApiLimit
columns.description: Indicates if the request counts against the API limit.

columns.name: DomContentLoadedEventEnd
columns.description: The DOM content loaded event end time.

columns.name: DomContentLoadedEventStart
columns.description: The DOM content loaded event start time.

columns.name: EffectivePageTimeDeviationErrorType
columns.description: The effective page time deviation error type.

columns.name: EffectivePageTimeDeviationReason
columns.description: The effective page time deviation reason.

columns.name: HasChart
columns.description: Indicates if the report has a chart.

columns.name: IsBlockedRedirection
columns.description: Indicates if the redirection was blocked.

columns.name: IsCancelled
columns.description: Indicates if the operation was cancelled.

columns.name: IsInitial
columns.description: Indicates if this is the initial request.

columns.name: IsManaged
columns.description: Indicates if the package is managed.

columns.name: IsPush
columns.description: Indicates if this is a push operation.

columns.name: IsReleased
columns.description: Indicates if the package is released.

columns.name: IsRequestCollationOn
columns.description: Indicates if request collation is on.

columns.name: IsRetry
columns.description: Indicates if this is a retry.

columns.name: IsSuccessful
columns.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

columns.name: MalformedUrl
columns.description: Indicates if the URL was malformed.

columns.name: NumGraphDepth
columns.description: The number of graph depth levels.

columns.name: UseApiToken
columns.description: Indicates if an API token was used.
